Title: Scriban: Sandbox escape due to TypedObjectAccessorcache bypassing MemberFilter after TemplateContext reuse
Description: `TemplateContext` caches type accessors by `Type` only, but those accessors are built using the current `MemberFilter` and `MemberRenamer`. When a `TemplateContext` is reused and the filter is tightened for a later render, Scriban still reuses the old accessor and continues exposing members that should now be hidden.
